metadata.description: Observability, billing, and analytics MCP servers for Claude Code

plugins.name: meagain
plugins.description: Configures MCP servers for NeonDB, PostHog, Sentry, RevenueCat, Stripe, and Vercel

plugins.name: neon
plugins.description: Manage your Neon projects and databases with the neon-postgres agent skill and the Neon MCP Server.

plugins.name: posthog
plugins.description: Access PostHog analytics, feature flags, experiments, error tracking, and insights directly from Claude Code.

plugins.name: sentry
plugins.description: Sentry error monitoring integration. Access error reports, analyze stack traces, search issues by fingerprint, and debug production errors.

plugins.name: revenuecat
plugins.description: Configure RevenueCat projects, apps, products, entitlements, and offerings directly from Claude Code.

plugins.name: vercel
plugins.description: Vercel deployment platform integration. Manage deployments, check build status, access logs, configure domains, and control your frontend infrastructure.

plugins.name: github
plugins.description: Official GitHub MCP server. Create issues, manage pull requests, review code, search repositories, and interact with GitHub's full API. Requires GITHUB_PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

plugins.name: oxlint-lsp
plugins.description: Oxlint language server for real-time lint diagnostics

plugins.name: tsgo-lsp
plugins.description: TypeScript Go (tsgo) language server for fast type checking
